arts.ttl: Why Barcelona can't play Dani Olmo or Pau Victor ... for now
arts.sum: Though the stadium is not yet operational, as it is being renovated ahead of a partial re-opening later this year, Barça had hoped the money raised would serve to register star signing Dani Olmo and young forward Pau Víctor with LaLiga for the second half of the season. The club's final option was the sale of VIP boxes at Camp Nou. Sources have told ESPN the deal is worth around €100m, but finalising the terms, getting the paperwork to LaLiga and providing proof of the money before the Dec. 31 deadline was difficult.

arts.ttl: Barcelona learn Dani Olmo fate as LaLiga issue final decision on player registration
arts.sum: Barcelona have tried every trick in the book to get Dani Olmo registered as one of their players, but LaLiga have knocked them back in what could be the final blow. The Catalan outfit signed the attacking midfielder for €55 million from RB Leipzig last summer, but were unable to initially register him due to […] The post Barcelona learn Dani Olmo fate as LaLiga issue final decision on player registration first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Spanish league again denies Barcelona's request to register Olmo
arts.sum: The league and the federation said in a joint statement that even though Barcelona eventually was able to meet the salary-cap rules, the players can’t be registered again after already having been dropped because of the missed deadline. Each Spanish league club has a salary cap that is calculated based on a series of factors, including revenues, costs and debts.

arts.ttl: Official: La Liga release statement, rejecting Barcelona’s Dani Olmo & Pau Víctor efforts
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Saturday seen their latest efforts to register Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor for the 2nd half of the campaign knocked back. This comes by…

arts.ttl: LaLiga reject latest Barça bid to re-register Olmo
arts.sum: LaLiga and the Royal Spanish Football Federation [RFEF] have rejected Barcelona's request to re-register Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor for the second half of the season, a joint statement confirmed on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Leading Barcelona star left out of squad for Barbastro clash
arts.sum: A headline member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has been omitted from the club’s travelling squad to face Barbastro. The player in question? Raphinha. Barcelona are…

arts.ttl: Milan and Juventus on alert as Dani Olmo ban now official
arts.sum: Milan and Juventus are on high alert after LaLiga confirmed that Barcelona will not be...

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: LaLiga reject Barcelona's Dani Olmo registration appeal
arts.sum: LaLiga and the Spanish federation, the RFEF, have officially rejected Barcelona's request to register Dani Olmo . Barcelona will seek recourse to legal action after LaLiga and the RFEF have jointly announced to deny the club's appeal to register Olmo.

arts.ttl: Barcelona president accidentally leaks huge Dani Olmo registration update
arts.sum: Barcelona president Joan Laporta appears to leak a RFEF statement about Dani Olmo's La Liga registration.
